# Figure description: этикетка_v2.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Список_приложений/этикетка_v2.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **title page / cover label** (титульный лист / этикетка) — specifically the bibliographic identification card affixed to the cover of a bound geological report volume. It is not a scientific figure per se, but rather the formal document identification label for a multi-volume geological survey report.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The label identifies **Volume V (Том V) — Graphic Appendices (графические приложения)** of a regional geological re-survey report. The coverage encompasses a large number of 1:200,000 scale map sheets in the M-42 and N-42 series across northern/central Kazakhstan, including:

- **N-42-XXXIII** (sheets 126-В, Г; 137-В, Г; 138)
- **N-42-XXXIV** (128-Г; 139, 140)
- **N-42-XXXV** (129-В, Г, 141)
- **M-42-II** (3-В, Г; 4; 15; 16)
- **M-42-IV** (7-А, Б; 8-А, Б)
- **M-42-III; M-42-V** (9)
- **M-42-VII** (26, 38)
- **M-42-VIII; M-42-IX** (29, 41)
- **M-42-XIV** (51, 52, 64-А, Б)
- **M-42-XV**

---

## Key Content

The label contains no graphical scientific content itself, but records the following critical bibliographic and administrative information:

- **Issuing organization:** Министерство геологии Казахской ССР (Ministry of Geology of the Kazakh SSR), Центрально-Казахстанское производственное геологическое объединение (Central Kazakhstan Production Geological Association) — **ЦЕНТРКАЗГЕОЛОГИЯ**
- **Copy number:** Экз. 3 (Copy No. 3)
- **Author:** Смольянинова Е.М. и др. (Smoliyaninova E.M. et al.)
- **Work type:** Геологическое доизучение масштаба 1:200,000 (Geological re-survey/additional study at 1:200,000 scale)
- **Report subtitle:** Отчёт Западно-Тенизской ПСП по работам 1978–1984 гг. (Report of the West-Teniz Field Survey Party on work conducted 1978–1984)
- **Volume:** Том V (графические приложения) — Volume V (Graphic Appendices)
- **Place and date of publication:** Караганда, 1984 г. (Karaganda, 1984)

---

## Research Value

This cover label establishes the **full bibliographic identity and institutional provenance** of the report volume, confirming it as the graphic appendices (maps, cross-sections, profiles, logs) compiled by the West-Teniz Field Survey Party under Smoliyaninova E.M. over a six-year campaign (1978–1984). For a geologist or AI research assistant, this label is essential for **correctly attributing and cataloguing** the accompanying figures — all geological maps, geophysical profiles, and structural cross-sections in this volume relate to the M-42/N-42 sheet area of central Kazakhstan, a region of known interest for base metals, coal, and structural geology. It confirms the spatial scope (multiple 1:200,000 sheets covering a broad area of the Central Kazakhstan fold belt) and that the contents represent the final synthesized graphic output of a major state-funded regional survey program.
